description: set a node's lifecycle status manually (e.g. mark `running` before dispatch)
rules: updates the node's status in record_store/run/.arbor/tree.json
status must be one of: pending, running, executed, merged, pruned, root
marking a node running before dispatch keeps the Observe projection accurate
usage: Set NODE (the node id) and STATUS (one of the valid statuses). Output: set_status.txt. If no run exists in the store, a bootstrap run with a root + one child node (n1) is created first.
limitation: Mechanical status flip only — it does not validate workflow ordering or run any evaluation. NODE must reference an existing node id.
